item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.74,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"chalked a missing station code on one case"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"tucked a paper depth note under a second lid"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"radioed a battery warning for a third unit to the depot"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"The next unit has no calibration date; have the collector carry a temporary reminder alongside it."}],"abstain_reason":""}
